title: ranunculus polyanthemos subsp. polyanthemoides
intro: Ranunculus polyanthemos subsp. polyanthemoides, also known as the Lesser Spearwort, is a plant species belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its alkaloid and glycoside content. The health benefits of Ranunculus polyanthemos subsp. polyanthemoides include its potential to treat wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, with the latter often used for its antimicrobial properties in treating various infections.
